description: Trust decision rules v4 — two-axis model: compositeRisk band × assurance gap. Hard gates evaluate before scoring; risk signals feed the composite, not individual rules.

rules.description: Gate: deny request from Tor exit node
rules.reason: Access from anonymising network detected; action blocked for security.
rules.display_message: We couldn't verify your connection. Please try again from your usual network.

rules.description: Gate: deny IP flagged as automated scanner by GreyNoise
rules.display_message: Something looks unusual about this request. Please try again.

rules.description: Gate: deny request burst — more than 5 requests in 1 minute from same customer
rules.reason: Unusual request burst detected; action blocked for customer protection.
rules.display_message: Too many requests detected. Please wait a moment before trying again.

rules.description: Gate: manual review for elevated velocity — more than 10 requests in 5 minutes
rules.reason: Elevated request rate detected; routing to manual review.
rules.display_message: Your activity is being reviewed. We will be in touch shortly.

rules.description: Deny: composite risk exceeds ceiling for Tier4 (account recovery)
rules.reason: Risk level exceeds tolerance for account recovery; access denied for customer protection.
rules.display_message: We're unable to process this request right now. Please contact support.

rules.description: Manual review: composite risk exceeds ceiling for Tier2 or Tier3 action
rules.reason: Risk level exceeds tolerance for this action; routing to manual review.
rules.display_message: Your transaction is being reviewed for security purposes. We'll notify you soon.

rules.description: Step-up: assurance gap on elevated (HIGH/MEDIUM) risk — enforce one level above required
rules.reason: Elevated risk with insufficient authentication; step up one level above required.
rules.display_message: Additional verification is required for this action.

rules.description: Step-up: assurance gap on low risk — enforce required AL only
rules.reason: Authentication level below required for this action.
rules.display_message: One more step needed for this action.

rules.description: Step-up: high composite risk even when assurance is met — enforce extra factor
rules.reason: High risk profile requires additional authentication beyond the required level.
rules.display_message: For your security, an extra verification step is required.

rules.description: Frictionless allow: low composite risk and assurance level met
rules.reason: Low composite risk and authentication sufficient for this action.

default.reason: No specific policy matched; defaulting to required authentication level step-up.
default.display_message: Additional verification is required for this action.
